name: fn-route
fn-whitelist-check
fn-stats-dispatch
ui-card-total
format:
Total Scans
{{msg.payload || 0}}
all attempts today

name: ui-card-auth
format:
Authorized
{{msg.payload || 0}}
granted access

name: ui-card-denied
format:
Denied
{{msg.payload || 0}}
rejected attempts

name: ui-card-last
format:
Last Scan
{{msg.payload.uid || '—'}}
{{msg.payload.verdict}}
{{msg.payload.ts || ''}}

name: fn-state-update
ui-hero-state
format:
{{msg.payload === 'OPEN' ? '🔓' : msg.payload === 'ALARM' ? '🚨' : '🔒'}}
{{msg.payload || 'LOCKED'}}
door state

name: ui-timeline
format:
TimeUIDResult
{{e.ts}}{{e.uid}}{{e.ok ? 'OK' : 'DENY'}}
No events yet — waiting for RFID scans...

name: ui-wl-input
label: Enter UID (hex, e.g. 4C8A285D)
tooltip: Type a UID and click Add or Remove

name: fn-wl-mutate
ui-wl-display
format:
Authorized UIDs
{{uid}}
No UIDs in whitelist — all access denied.

name: fn-ready
func:
node.warn('SmartLock: READY signal received from Arduino');
return null;

name: fn-init-exec
ui-global-style
format: <style>@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@500;700&display=swap');body,.nr-dashboard-theme{font-family:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif!important;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at top,#1a1f3a 0%,#0d1117 50%)!important}body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at 20% 30%,rgba(0,212,255,0.08),transparent 40%),radial-gradient(circle at 80% 70%,rgba(16,185,129,0.06),transparent 40%),radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,rgba(139,92,246,0.04),transparent 50%);animation:slAuroraDrift 20s ease-in-out infinite alternate;pointer-events:none;z-index:0}@keyframes slAuroraDrift{0%{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1)}100%{transform:translate(2%,-2%) scale(1.05)}}.slct,.slca,.slcd,.slcl{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(22,27,39,0.9),rgba(13,17,23,0.9))!important;backdrop-filter:blur(12px) saturate(1.2);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px) saturate(1.2);border:1px solid rgba(45,55,72,0.6)!important;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1),box-shadow 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)}.slct::before,.slca::before,.slcd::before,.slcl::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(0,212,255,0.6),transparent)}.slca::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(16,185,129,0.7),transparent)}.slcd::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(239,68,68,0.7),transparent)}.slcl::before{background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(248,250,252,0.5),transparent)}.slct:hover,.slca:hover,.slcd:hover,.slcl:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,212,255,0.15)}.slct .val,.slca .val,.slcd .val{font-feature-settings:'tnum';letter-spacing:-1px;text-shadow:0 0 30px currentColor;filter:brightness(1.1);transition:all 0.3s ease}.sl-hero{position:relative;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)!important;transition:background 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1),box-shadow 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)!important}.sl-hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-50%;background:conic-gradient(from 0deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,0.06),transparent 30%);animation:slHeroShimmer 8s linear infinite;pointer-events:none}@keyframes slHeroShimmer{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}.sl-hero-state,.sl-hero-icon{position:relative;z-index:1;text-shadow:0 0 40px currentColor}.sl-btn{position:relative;width:100%;height:100%;min-height:42px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:10px;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:2px;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;overflow:hidden;transition:transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1),box-shadow 0.3s ease;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--btn-c1),var(--btn-c2));box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.3),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.1)}.sl-btn::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at var(--mx,50%) var(--my,50%),rgba(255,255,255,0.28),transparent 40%);opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;pointer-events:none}.sl-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px) scale(1.02);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.45),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18)}.sl-btn:hover::after{opacity:1}.sl-btn:active{transform:translateY(0) scale(0.98)}.sl-btn-open{--btn-c1:#10b981;--btn-c2:#059669}.sl-btn-lock{--btn-c1:#475569;--btn-c2:#1e293b}.sl-btn-alarm{--btn-c1:#ef4444;--btn-c2:#b91c1c}.sl-tl-row{transition:background 0.3s,transform 0.3s;animation:slRowIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1)}.sl-tl-row:hover{background:rgba(0,212,255,0.05);transform:translateX(2px)}@keyframes slRowIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}}.sl-tl::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#00d4ff,#0369a1)!important;border-radius:4px!important}.sl-wl-chip{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(30,58,95,0.8),rgba(29,78,216,0.4))!important;border:1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.4)!important;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(29,78,216,0.2);transition:transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1),box-shadow 0.3s;cursor:default}.sl-wl-chip:hover{transform:translateY(-2px) scale(1.05);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(59,130,246,0.4)}.nr-dashboard-cardpanel{background:rgba(22,27,39,0.4)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border:1px solid rgba(45,55,72,0.4)!important;border-radius:14px!important}md-card{background:transparent!important;box-shadow:none!important}</style>
